title: blechnum rimbachii
intro: Blechnum rimbachii, also known as the Rimbach's chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum rimbachii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Blechnum rimbachii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
